commit.message:
Fix SQL import parser for real MariaDB dumps

- Replace lazy regex table extraction with depth-counting parser so
  types like int(11) and varchar(100) no longer truncate the body
- mapImportedType now handles display-width types (int(11) -> INT,
  int(10) unsigned -> UNSIGNED INT, tinyint -> INT, etc.)
- Column name regex now supports backtick-quoted names with special
  characters (e.g. `erstellt?am`)
- Add Load .sql file button to import modal as paste workaround for
  VS Code webview clipboard restrictions

commit.message:
Remove pipefail from install/uninstall scripts for sh compatibility

pipefail is a bash-only option and fails on Raspberry Pi OS when scripts
are invoked with sh/dash. Neither script uses pipes, so pipefail is not
needed. worker.sh keeps it as it uses pipes and runs under bash.

eval_results, judge_attempts) to initialize(), a seed_eval_defaults()
function seeding 3 system templates + 5 system variants (A-E), 12
eval.* settings keys, and 12 new tests covering table creation,
idempotency, constraint enforcement, and FK cascade delete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: code-review fixes for tasks 1 and 8

Task 1 (DB schema):
- EVAL_SETTINGS_DEFAULTS: use typed Python values (int/float/bool)
  instead of pre-stringified strings — get_all_settings() returns
  correct types to callers
- seed_eval_defaults: call _do_seed_eval_defaults inside the
  with self._lock block to eliminate race window between commit
  and template seeding
- test_eval_settings_all_seeded: add type assertions to catch
  encoding regressions

Task 8 (SPA skeleton):
- Eval.jsx: read evalSubTab.value at top of render body so Preact
  subscribes the component — sub-tab switching was broken at runtime
- store.js: log eval poll errors instead of silent swallow (lesson #7)
- app.jsx: call stopEvalPoll on tab departure to prevent interval leak

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add eval variant, template, and settings API endpoints

Tasks 3 + 5: 22 new /api/eval/* endpoints covering variant CRUD,
clone, bulk generate, import/export, template management, trends,
datasource health test, settings (validated, all-or-nothing), and
recurring eval schedule creation. 48 new tests in two test files;

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

(run count, growth, judge reliability).

Store additions: fetchEvalTrends, testDataSource, saveEvalSettings.
CSS: eval-specific tokens reusing existing CSS vars only.
Build: zero errors, 213.7kb bundle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add eval engine module (generate + judge + metrics)

Migrates principle extraction, judge scoring, compute_metrics, and render_report from lessons-db/eval.py into ollama_queue/eval_engine.py. Adapted for the eval_runs/eval_results DB tables, httpx proxy calls, and circuit-breaker error handling. Adds run_eval_session() top-level orchestrator for use as FastAPI background task. 49 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: implement EvalRuns and EvalVariants views (L1/L2/L3 disclosure)

Task 9: EvalRuns — RunTriggerPanel (variant multi-select, per_cluster,
judge model, SchedulingModeSelector with signal-driven sub-inputs,
dry-run toggle), ActiveRunProgress (live stage/pct/per-variant bars,
ETA, circuit breaker banner), RunHistoryTable + RunRow (L1 status dot /
winner / quality, L2 metrics table + action buttons, L3 paginated
ResultsTable), ResultRow + GenerationInspector (L1 score + pass/fail,

Task 10: EvalVariants — VariantToolbar (new config form, bulk generate
preview + confirm, export/import), VariantTable + VariantRow (L1
badges + quality, L2 model/template/sparkline/clone, L3 run history),
TemplateSection + TemplateRow (L1 ID/label, L2 preview + clone, L3
full instruction textarea).

store.js: added fetchEvalVariants, fetchEvalTemplates, fetchEvalRuns,
fetchEvalSettings, triggerEvalRun, cancelEvalRun.

index.css: added eval-run-row, eval-run-row-l2/l3, eval-variant-row-l2,
eval-metrics-table, eval-progress-track/bar, eval-badge, eval-circuit-
breaker-banner, eval-checkbox-row, eval-mode-option, eval-num-input.

Build: zero errors, 229.7kb bundle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: code-review fixes for second-wave tasks (2, 3+5, 9+10, 11+12)

Security:
- api.py: validate variants/per_cluster/run_mode before shell interpolation
  in create_eval_schedule (prevents injection via shell=True daemon)
- api.py: reject unknown eval.* keys in PUT /api/eval/settings
- api.py: split f1_threshold/error_budget validation to 0.0-1.0 (was 2.0)

Data integrity:
- db.py: add row_type column + UNIQUE(run_id,variant,source,target,row_type)
  to eval_results — prevents duplicate judge rows on restart mid-run
- eval_engine.py: INSERT OR IGNORE + row_type='generation'/'judge' discriminator
- eval_engine.py: filter _fetch_scored_rows to row_type='judge' only
- eval_engine.py: sort same_pool/diff_pool by id before shuffle for reproducibility

Bug fixes:
- eval_engine.py: fix JSON extraction to use rfind('}') instead of [^}]+
  regex — prevents silent score=1 on reasoning strings containing '}'
- eval_engine.py: assert → RuntimeError for lastrowid (survives -O mode)
- api.py: add _log.warning() in test_eval_datasource except block
- SchedulingModeSelector.jsx: move signal() to module level (was recreated
  on every parent re-render, silently discarding sub-field user input)
- SetupChecklist.jsx: add console.error() to two bare catch blocks
- DataSourcePanel.jsx: add console.error() to bare catch block
- EvalRuns.jsx: restart eval poll on mount when active run restored from
  sessionStorage (prevents frozen progress bar after page reload)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add eval run lifecycle API endpoints (Task 4)

Add 8 new endpoints under /api/eval/runs covering the full run lifecycle:
- GET /api/eval/runs — paginated run list with summary metrics
- POST /api/eval/runs — trigger a new run (validates variant, creates DB row, submits queue job)
- GET /api/eval/runs/{id} — full run detail with parsed metrics JSON
- DELETE /api/eval/runs/{id} — cancel queued/running run (400 if terminal)
- GET /api/eval/runs/{id}/results — all eval_results rows with row_type filter
- GET /api/eval/runs/{id}/progress — live progress (generated/judged/failed/pct_complete)
- POST /api/eval/runs/{id}/promote — mark completed run's variant as production in lessons-db
- POST /api/eval/runs/{id}/judge-rerun — re-run judge phase on completed/failed run

Supporting changes:
- db.py: add variant_id, label, cluster_id, scheduled_by, created_at, data_source_token
  columns to eval_runs (schema + _run_migrations); add 'queued' to status CHECK constraint
- eval_engine.py: add create_eval_run() standalone helper
- tests/test_api_eval_runs.py: 33 tests covering all 8 endpoints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(eval): add scheduling modes to run_eval_generate (Task 6)

- batch: baseline, processes all items
- opportunistic: throttles on high RAM/VRAM/CPU via _should_throttle()
- fill-open-slots: stops at max_runs or max_time_s wall-clock budget
- scheduled: batch behaviour + trigger log entry

_should_throttle() is fail-open (exceptions return False) and falls back
to get_health_log() when get_current_health() is unavailable.

run_eval_generate() accepts injectable _sleep parameter for deterministic
test control. 20 new tests covering all modes and throttle edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(eval): add run reproducibility — seed, judge_pairs, repeat endpoint (Task 13)

- eval_engine: _ensure_seed() generates and persists random seed before
  generation loop (lazy init with persistence for deterministic replay)
- run_eval_judge(): collect (source_item_id, target_item_id) pairs and
  persist to eval_runs.item_ids for exact replay via repeat endpoint
- api.py: POST /api/eval/runs/{id}/repeat — 422 if no item_ids or seed,
  creates new pending run with same seed + item_ids for stability testing
- RunRow.jsx: Repeat button for runs with item_ids set; sets evalActiveRun
  signal and navigates to runs sub-tab on success
- 6 new tests covering repeat endpoint (200, 422, 404) and seed persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve 5 bugs found in code audit (proxy DLQ, bash quoting, variants parse, eval deadlock, queue_job_id)

Bug 1a (daemon.py): _recover_orphans() was resetting proxy sentinel jobs to
pending on restart, causing daemon to shell-execute 'proxy:/api/generate'
→ exit 127 → DLQ. Now marks proxy jobs failed directly.

Bug 1b (db.py): get_pending_jobs() could race with proxy endpoint between
submit_job() and start_job(), dequeuing and shell-executing the sentinel.
Now filters 'command NOT LIKE proxy:%'.

Bug 2 (cli.py): ' '.join(command) stripped shell quoting from 'bash -c "..."'
args — source builtin received no filename argument. Now uses shlex.quote()
on both submit and schedule add command join sites.

Bug 3 (eval_engine.py): json.loads(run['variants']) raised JSONDecodeError
when create_eval_run() stored a plain variant ID string rather than a JSON
array, crashing every API-triggered eval run silently. Now defensive parse.

Bug 4 (api.py): trigger_eval_run submitted a queued job with command
'ollama-queue eval-run ...' which would deadlock: daemon holds current_job_id
while the subprocess calls /api/generate → try_claim_for_proxy() blocks
forever. Replaced with background thread calling run_eval_session() directly.

Bug 5 (api.py + eval_engine.py): proxy response never included job_id so
eval_results.queue_job_id was always NULL. Proxy now injects _queue_job_id
into response dict; eval_engine reads it by that key.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Deep audit HK + JP capital checklists (Grok 2026 sources)

HK: 345→360 lines — +12 real additions from Grok audit (14 duplicates filtered):
  - PPM: FMCC GP1, Responsible Person 5yr/3-day deadlines, Companies Registry
    filing obligations (s.6-8 penalties HK$5K+HK$500/day), SFC enforcement
    powers (s.194-196 fines up to HK$10M), enhanced PDPO cross-border/breach,
    SFC LPF marketing circular, Responsible Person personal liability (HK$1M/2yr)
  - PPM refs: Cap 637 ss.4-8, PDPO Cap 486
  - Operating agreement: Responsible Person penalties, CR annual return/change filing
  - Operating agreement refs: SFC Marketing Circular, CR Practice Direction

commit.message:
Add resize mode toggle to video player (Fit / Crop / Stretch)

Adds a small button in the top-right corner of the player that lets
users cycle between three video scaling modes:
- Fit: maintains aspect ratio, shows black bars where needed
- Crop: zooms to fill screen, maintains aspect ratio, crops edges
- Stretch: fills entire screen, may distort aspect ratio

Uses Media3's built-in AspectRatioFrameLayout resize modes.

commit.message:
Fix sync using server_seq instead of client timestamps

Pull filtering used client-side created_at timestamps, causing events
pushed late (e.g. after offline period) to be missed by other clients
whose cursor had already advanced past those timestamps. Now uses a
server-side auto-increment sequence for reliable ordering.

Switch drag-to-cart from pointer events to touch events for iPad reliability

iOS fires pointercancel when it claims a touch for scrolling, killing the
drag. Touch events don't have this problem — the browser keeps sending
touchmove regardless. Pre-activation scroll detection still works via the
8px threshold on the element-level touchmove listener.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Lock 3D viewer camera at publish time for consistent orientation across devices

Previously published quotes loaded camera from localStorage (device-specific),
so mobile viewers saw a different default orientation to the builder desktop.

- builder.js: capture camera positions from localStorage at publish time,
  send as {camera: {closed, open}} in POST /publish body
- server.js publish: save req.body.camera as quote.publishedCamera in quote JSON
- Published HTML: initViewer now takes publishedCam object instead of camKey;
  uses embedded camera if present, falls back to FitToWindow
- Removed per-device localStorage save from published view — every viewer
  always sees the orientation that was set in the builder at publish time

commit.message:
fix: turn-1 topic acknowledgement + handoff fade race condition

Turn 1 greeting: update first-turn prompt to allow a brief generic
acknowledgement of the user's topic ("that sounds interesting",
"good thing to think about") without commentary. Remove the
"Do not reference this" restriction. Raise max_tokens 80 → 120
to accommodate two short sentences.

Handoff fade bug: the 2-second stroll-close setTimeout (started when
turns_remaining hits 0) persists as a plain JS timer across the room
transition to Stroll 2. If the timer fires after the handoff icon is
tapped — either from a dormancy-recovery scenario or a race with turn 8
— onStrollClose() kills Stroll 2 immediately.

Fix: store both timer IDs (strollCloseTimer1/2 refs) and clear them
in handleThresholdTap before proceeding. Also reset strollFading and
strollClosing state to false so no fade CSS is active on Stroll 2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve oblique shear with float-precision Bresenham re-rasterization

Replace naive row-shift + gap-fill with an algorithm that transforms
pixel positions using exact float math, then draws Bresenham lines
between originally 8-connected pixels. Preserves stroke connectivity
and thickness for diagonals like / \ 7. Default angle changed to +20.
